ideas.title: Whispers of the Night
ideas.hook: Shh... listen, can you hear the whispers of the night?
ideas.theme: Nature sounds to help babies sleep

ideas.title: Rock-a-Bye Ocean
ideas.hook: Come sail away with me to the rock-a-bye ocean!

ideas.title: Stars in the Sky
ideas.hook: Twinkle twinkle little star, watch them as they're carried far.
ideas.theme: A lullaby of stars for bedtime

ideas.title: Sleepy Forest Friends
ideas.hook: Join the sleepy forest animals as they close their eyes and drift away.
ideas.theme: A bedtime story about forest animals sleeping

ideas.title: Lullaby of the Night Sky
ideas.hook: Come along and dream with me under a blanket of stars.
ideas.theme: A calming lullaby about the night sky
